_doc: Per-source canonical-coverage probes consumed by check_collector_coverage.py.
url_contains_name  — fetch URL, parse via collector, assert at least one
parsed event whose name contains the expected string.
city_min_events    — call the collector for a city, assert the parsed event
count is at least min_events. Catches site-wide breakage
even when no specific anchor name is known.
Add new probes as bugs are fixed so the regression doesn't recur.

mevalim.note: Fix for the /shows/ vs /concerts/ restructure (PR mevalim-shows-musicals).
Kids-shows H1-override path: JSON-LD name='מיקי' (slug-truncated) but H1 stem is 'מיקי מוכתר'. Probe asserts the override actually fires.
